content.en:
There are no special treasures in this secret room, and there is no inheritance, only a coffin.

That's right, it's a coffin, and it's not an ordinary coffin, but a transparent cold jade coffin, exuding a terrifying jade cold aura, which can be called a cold jade coffin.

The material of the cold jade coffin is extraordinary, and it is estimated to be very precious, but this is not the reason why Ye Tian was shocked.

What really shocked him was that there was a corpse in the cold jade coffin, the body of a girl.

Ye Tian thought that the reason for the corpse was because this was a battlefield ruin, and he didn't know how many years it had existed, and no living life had been found so far, so there should be no living creatures here.

Moreover, it is impossible for a living person to be placed in a cold jade coffin, so this woman can only be a corpse.

"Strange, how could there be a cold jade coffin and a corpse here? Could it be that this woman is a relative or important person of the owner of this palace?" Ye Tian guessed.

The cold jade coffin was not fixed or sealed, and was placed in the center of the chamber as if it were an ordinary thing.

Ye Tian approached this cold jade coffin, and his divine sense tried to extend into this cold jade coffin, but was stopped by the cold jade coffin.

"Divine consciousness can't extend even a bit, what kind of material is this cold jade coffin?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Although many things can block the divine sense, it is not so that even the true monarch divine consciousness like him cannot invade the slightest!

"This cold jade coffin is worth a lot of money!"

Ye Tian sighed.

After all, this kind of treasure that can't even invade the slightest bit of divine consciousness is too useful!

Even for the Dao Ancestors, the value of this cold jade coffin was unimaginable, because there was almost no such material in the chaos, or it was extremely lacking.

What's more, if the Divine Consciousness probes in a large area, the Cold Jade Coffin can not only organize the invasion of the Divine Consciousness, but also automatically ignore the Divine Consciousness, so that the Divine Consciousness cannot know the existence of the Cold Jade Coffin.

It is conceivable that if there is a person hiding in the cold jade coffin, even if he offends the strong, he can easily avoid the disaster.

Moreover, if some valuable things are placed in the cold jade coffin and then put into the body, even the most powerful person will not be able to spy on the treasures on his body.

For example, a certain True Ancestor obtains a treasure that is enough for countless Dao Ancestors to want, and once it is leaked, he will die, but if there is this kind of cold jade coffin or cold jade of the same material, he can put the treasure into it, and no longer worry about his treasure being discovered.

Thinking of this, Ye Tian was also very excited.

He stepped forward to open the cold jade coffin, but when he pushed it like this, he didn't shake the lid of the cold jade coffin.

"Can't open it!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He had almost completely exerted himself, but he couldn't open the lid of the cold jade coffin.

He also tried to break the cold jade coffin, but when he attacked, he found that a ban appeared, which directly rebounded his attack.

"If you are not a Dao Ancestor, you can't destroy the cold jade coffin!"

Ye Tian had such a thought.

With his current strength, he can't shake the cold jade coffin at all, and he doesn't even think about opening the cold jade coffin.

Maybe when he is promoted to the top Dao Ancestor and has the strength to rival the Dao Ancestor, he will be able to open this cold jade coffin.

Ye Tian didn't bother with this cold jade coffin, but chose to put it away directly.

Maybe the identity of the woman in this cold jade coffin is not ordinary, but the person who has fallen, what is he afraid of?

The Hanyu coffin was very valuable, and he would not give it up because of a corpse.

When Ye Tian came out of this secret room, after waiting for a while, the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden finally came out of the inheritance space.

It can be seen from the smile on the face of the Yunzi Divine Maiden that she has gained a lot, and the inheritance of the top true ancestor must be very extraordinary, otherwise her identity as the Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance would not be so excited and excited.

Ye Tian originally thought that after the Yunzi Divine Maiden came out, she would ask about the Hanyu coffin.

After all, the woman in the cold jade coffin may have something to do with the owner of this palace, and the inheritance of the palace owner may mention the woman in the cold jade coffin.

But the Yunzi Divine Maiden didn't say anything, and she didn't seem to know about the cold jade coffin.

"Maybe the legacy doesn't mention anything!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Since the Yunzi Divine Maiden didn't know about this, Ye Tian was not ready to say it, otherwise the cold jade coffin would be exposed.

The inheritance has been obtained, and the remaining value of this palace is those True Ancestor-level puppets, but these puppets have already been activated, and with the program in place, there is no way to stop them, and there is no way to make them recognize their owners again.

What's more, these True Ancestor-level puppets were too powerful, Ye Tian could deal with one or two, but with a bunch of True Ancestor-level puppets, Ye Tian couldn't deal with them at all.

Soon after.

Ye Tian and the Yun Zi Divine Maiden came out of this palace.

At this time, it was time for the two to separate.

"Yun Zi Divine Maiden, let's separate here!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Good!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded.

Although she still wanted to explore the battlefield ruins with Ye Tian, which would be safer and she could also obtain many treasures, it was impossible for Ye Tian to agree, so she naturally wouldn't mention it.

After the two separated, the Yun Zi Divine Maiden had no intention of continuing to stay in the battlefield ruins, but left directly towards the entrance of the battlefield ruins, preparing to leave here.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, chose a direction at random, without any purpose, looking for the treasures in the battlefield ruins.

------------

The remains of the battlefield, among the ruins.

A True Monarch stood on the ruined ground, looking at the True Monarchs around him vigilantly, and the whole person was very nervous.

He is one of the top True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Palace, named Jingchi True Monarch, although he is not a True Monarch on the True Monarch List, but he can at least rank in the top fifty among the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Palace.

The Void Heaven Temple has tens of millions of True Monarchs, and he can be ranked in the top fifty, which is already very remarkable.

But now, he is surrounded by a group of true monarchs.

In terms of strength, none of these True Monarchs are his opponents, but there are quite a few True Monarchs surrounding him, there are hundreds, and the combined strength of these True Monarchs completely surpasses him.

The reason why these True Monarchs surrounded him was because he had obtained the bones of one of the True Ancestors in this ruin.

The key is that this True Ancestor's storage treasure is still on his body, and it is conceivable that once he gets this True Ancestor's bones, it is equivalent to getting the entire net worth of a True Ancestor.

Moreover, judging from the breath of the True Ancestor's bones, this dead True Ancestor was not a weak True Ancestor, at least a True Ancestor in the middle of the Great Dao, and this True Ancestor was already quite powerful among the True Ancestors.

"Jingchi Zhenjun, take out the treasure of that True Ancestor, and everyone share it equally, otherwise you won't be able to leave today!"

A true monarch said coldly.

If it was usual, he would definitely be respectful when he saw Jingchi Zhenjun, after all, Jingchi Zhenjun's strength far surpassed him.

But today, more than 100 of them are united, which is enough to kill Jingchi Zhenjun.

The reason why they haven't made a move yet is because Jingchi Zhenjun's strength is too strong, if they fight, at least half of their true monarchs will fall, and after the fall, how to distribute it is also a problem, maybe they will fight again.

"Do you really want to attack me? Once you attack me, you will offend me, and you are not afraid that I will trouble you in the future?"

Keichi Zhenjun threatened.

"Hahahaha, Jingchi Zhenjun, we are not afraid of your threat! There are too many opportunities for battlefield relics, maybe in the near future, our strength will surpass you, who will be afraid of you?"

"Yes, we are not afraid of you, do you think you are the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son? If it is the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son of your Void Heaven Temple who appears here today, we will definitely leave immediately!"

One by one, the true monarch spoke.

"If the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is here, I'm afraid you will all kneel and beg for mercy!"

Jingchi Zhenjun said coldly.

Time passed slowly, and the surrounding True Monarchs seemed to gather more and more, but there was no True Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace.

Moreover, he knew very well that these true monarchs were about to be unable to bear it.

The ruins of the battlefield were too big, and he didn't know if there were any True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple around, besides, ordinary True Monarchs only came to die, and there was no help at all.

"Let's go!"

Jingchi Zhenjun is ready to break through.

No matter what, he couldn't give up the treasure he had so hard to get!
